rationale: Budget v7 — recalibrated to the ACTUAL current finding floor (1131) as measured by a full --json run with the db-backed detectors live. The prior v6 maxTotal=100 was stale by ~11x (real total was 1131) and only never-fired because the workflow was continue-on-error. With the suite now a real PR ratchet gate, the budget gate (total > maxTotal*1.05) fails a >5% finding-count spike; the ratchet separately fails ANY new high/critical. Most findings are medium UX/observability advisories (ux-a11y 500, env-config-drift ~300) tracked as debt, not regressions.
